title: MuddyCotton
description: Well optimized Action & Adventure modpack with all the bells and whistles for the MuddyCotton SMP.
body:
MuddyCotton is a well optimized Action & Adventure modpack for group friends to play with.

You can find information about joining **MuddyCotton SMP** or hosting **your own instance** at our Discord.

Issue tracker also hosted on our Discord.

## The MuddyCotton features (SMP)
- 100+ new biomes and seasons powered by [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith) and [Fabric Seasons](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-seasons)
- Combat improvements by [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)
- New dungeons and structures by [Dungeons and Taverns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns)
- New types of foods and crops by [Farmer's Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)
- New and rethinked dimensions by [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether), [BetterNether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether) and [BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend)
- Quality of Life features by [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks), [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu), [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap), [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) and more
